narrative:
Lordstown Village B (precinct in Trumbull County) has 955 registered voters, with 52.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 31.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 15.1 percentage points.
